ember_rat_skewer.name: Ember-Kissed Rat Skewer
ember_rat_skewer.description: Rat meat rubbed with ember spice and seared over hot coals. Crude but satisfying.
ember_rat_skewer.sprite_desc: A wooden skewer of charred rat meat chunks glazed with glowing ember spice, wisps of smoke rising

herbed_serpent_fricassee.name: Herbed Serpent Fricassee
herbed_serpent_fricassee.description: Delicate snake flesh simmered in rosemary-infused oil until tender.
herbed_serpent_fricassee.sprite_desc: A rustic clay plate of golden-brown serpent pieces in a fragrant rosemary sauce with green herbs

spiced_frog_legs_provencal.name: Spiced Frog Legs ProvenÃ§al
spiced_frog_legs_provencal.description: Pan-fried frog legs in a serpent-pepper reduction. Light, crisp, and invigorating.
spiced_frog_legs_provencal.sprite_desc: Crispy golden frog legs arranged on a dark plate with a drizzle of red pepper reduction

mushroom_goblin_potage.name: Cave Mushroom & Goblin Potage
mushroom_goblin_potage.description: A hearty potage of goblin flesh and earthy cave mushrooms. Not pretty, but fortifying.
mushroom_goblin_potage.sprite_desc: A steaming iron cauldron of thick brown-green stew with mushroom caps floating on top

thyme_bear_haunch.name: Wild Thyme Roasted Bear Haunch
thyme_bear_haunch.description: Slow-roasted bear meat on a bed of wild thyme. Barbaric in name, masterful in result.
thyme_bear_haunch.sprite_desc: A massive roasted bear leg on a wooden platter surrounded by sprigs of wild thyme

celery_lizard_broth.name: Pale Celery Lizard Bouillon
celery_lizard_broth.description: A light bouillon made from dungeon lizard and pale celery. Restorative and clean.
celery_lizard_broth.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth verdant broth made from lizard meat and pale celery, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

bullywug_carrot_bisque.name: Cave Carrot Bullywug Bisque
bullywug_carrot_bisque.description: Chunky cave carrots purÃ©ed with tender bullywug leg. Rich, orange, and surprisingly refined.
bullywug_carrot_bisque.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth verdant broth made from bullywug leg and cave carrot, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

spore_silk_consomme.name: Glowing Spore & Spider ConsommÃ©
spore_silk_consomme.description: Spider-silk gelatin clarified with glowing spores. The resulting broth shimmers faintly.
spore_silk_consomme.sprite_desc: A crystal bowl of shimmering translucent broth with faint bioluminescent blue-green glow

gnoll_herb_ragout.name: Braised Gnoll Shank with Cave Herbs
gnoll_herb_ragout.description: Gnoll rendered low and slow with aromatic herbs and root vegetables. A warrior's reward.
gnoll_herb_ragout.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared gnoll hide, wild thyme, and cave carrot, plated with a warm russet reduction drizzled on top

spriggan_ragout.name: Spriggan Thorn Ragout en Cocotte
spriggan_ragout.description: Thorny spriggan extract reduced with pepper and mushroom into a nimble-making sauce.
spriggan_ragout.sprite_desc: A bubbling iron pot of thick verdant stew made from spriggan thorn, serpent pepper, and cave mushroom, steam rising from the surface

manticore_bisque.name: Manticore Spine Grand Bisque
manticore_bisque.description: Manticore spine marrow extracted into a bisque fiery with ember spice. Brutally strengthening.
manticore_bisque.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth warm russet broth made from manticore spine, ember spice, and pale celery, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

blink_hare_hasenpfeffer.name: Blink-Gland Hasenpfeffer
blink_hare_hasenpfeffer.description: Blink dog gland dissolved in valerian-mushroom stock. The first spoonful and you feel faster.
blink_hare_hasenpfeffer.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared blink gland, valerian root, and cave mushroom, plated with a earthy reduction drizzled on top

troll_tourte.name: Braised Troll Shin Tourte
troll_tourte.description: Troll hide's regenerative proteins slow-extracted and baked in a celery-rosemary pastry crust.
troll_tourte.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared troll hide, pale celery, and rosemary sprig, plated with a verdant reduction drizzled on top

wisp_risotto.name: Luminous Wisp Essence Risotto
wisp_risotto.description: Wisp essence stirred into a mushroom risotto that glows faintly. Each bite sharpens the mind.
wisp_risotto.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared wisp essence, glowing spore, and crimson fungus, plated with a pale violet reduction drizzled on top

raven_elixir.name: Raven-Black Sage Elixir
raven_elixir.description: Raven feather extract distilled with valerian and nightshade. A scholar's midnight draught.
raven_elixir.sprite_desc: A glass flask of shimmering dark liquid distilled from raven feather, valerian root, and nightshade leaf, tiny bubbles rising within

dragon_scale_pot_au_feu.name: Dragon Scale Pot-au-Feu
dragon_scale_pot_au_feu.description: Dragon scale rendered in void-salt brine with bear and thyme. The pot practically growls.
dragon_scale_pot_au_feu.sprite_desc: A bubbling bronze pot with dragon-scale fragments, meat, and herbs in a rich amber broth

medusa_bouillabaisse.name: Medusa Blood Bouillabaisse
medusa_bouillabaisse.description: Medusa blood carefully neutralized and simmered with pepper and mushroom. Sharpens eyes and mind alike.
medusa_bouillabaisse.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared Medusa's Blood, nightshade leaf, serpent pepper, and cave mushroom, plated with a verdant reduction drizzled on top

chimera_heart_royale.name: Chimera Heart Royale
chimera_heart_royale.description: The tripartite heart of a chimera reduced with root herbs. Every stat improves. Every sense sharpens.
chimera_heart_royale.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared chimera heart, ember spice, mandrake root, and cave carrot, plated with a earthy reduction drizzled on top

basilisk_perpignan.name: Basilisk Stone Broth Perpignan
basilisk_perpignan.description: Petrified basilisk gaze dissolved by rosemary acid into a clarified, terrifyingly good broth.
basilisk_perpignan.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth earthy broth made from basilisk stone, rosemary sprig, pale celery, and cave carrot, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

frost_consomme_glace.name: Frost-Gland ConsommÃ© GlacÃ©
frost_consomme_glace.description: Frost gland essence crystallized by void salt, balanced by crimson fungus. Clarity in every spoonful.
frost_consomme_glace.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth earthy broth made from frost gland, void salt, crimson fungus, and valerian root, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

eagle_eye_consomme.name: Eagle-Eye Summit ConsommÃ©
eagle_eye_consomme.description: Eagle feather broth enriched with ancient mushroom and dragon salt. Vision reaches to the horizon.
eagle_eye_consomme.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth warm russet broth made from eagle feather, cave carrot, petrified mushroom, and dragon salt, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

philosophers_grand_banquet.name: The Philosopher's Grand Banquet
philosophers_grand_banquet.lore: The apex of dungeon cuisine. Every great cook dreams of this dish. Most die attempting it.
philosophers_grand_banquet.sprite_desc: A large ornate platter laden with an elaborate arrangement of chimera heart, Dragon Scale, and necromancer phylactery, garnished with edible flowers and earthy sauce

abyssal_midnight_feast.name: Abyssal Midnight Feast
abyssal_midnight_feast.description: A forbidden dish from the deep places. The ingredients are vile. The result is transcendent.
abyssal_midnight_feast.sprite_desc: A dark obsidian plate with an arrangement of shadowy foods emanating purple eldritch vapors

serpent_king_culmination.name: Serpent King's Culmination
serpent_king_culmination.description: The pinnacle of venom-cuisine. Snake, spine, and stone distilled into a sublime crescendo.
serpent_king_culmination.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared manticore spine, Medusa's Blood, serpent pepper, dragon salt, and rosemary sprig, plated with a warm russet reduction drizzled on top

dragon_heart_braisage.name: Dragon-Heart Sublime Braisage
dragon_heart_braisage.description: The ultimate warrior's feast. A red dragon's heart braised in blue dragon brine. Legendary strength.
dragon_heart_braisage.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared red dragon heart, blue dragon scale, dragon salt, ember spice, and mandrake root, plated with a crimson reduction drizzled on top

goblin_rat_stew.name: Goblin and Rat Stew
goblin_rat_stew.lore: A foul but filling stew suited to the dungeon's low standards. Two scrawny survivors boiled together — their toughness transfers to whoever is desperate enough to eat.
goblin_rat_stew.sprite_desc: A battered tin pot of chunky brown stew with visible meat pieces and a greasy surface

serpent_frog_bisque.name: Serpent and Frog Bisque
serpent_frog_bisque.lore: Two slippery creatures make a surprisingly agile meal.
serpent_frog_bisque.sprite_desc: A smooth creamy pale-green soup in a stone bowl with a coiled garnish of thin snake skin

bat_rat_soup.name: Cave Creature Broth
bat_rat_soup.lore: The dungeon's most common inhabitants, simmered together.
bat_rat_soup.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth earthy broth made from bat wing and rat meat, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

chitin_bone_crisps.name: Chitin and Bone Crisps
chitin_bone_crisps.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared insect carapace and bone shard, plated with a warm russet reduction drizzled on top

goblin_bone_pottage.name: Goblin Bone Pottage
goblin_bone_pottage.lore: A thick, grim pottage. Goblins eat this themselves, apparently.
goblin_bone_pottage.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared goblin flesh and bone shard, plated with a verdant reduction drizzled on top

spider_silk_jelly.name: Spider Silk Aspic
spider_silk_jelly.lore: The silk dissolves into a trembling, iridescent aspic that sharpens the senses to an uncanny edge.
spider_silk_jelly.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared spider silk and eye jelly, plated with a pale violet reduction drizzled on top

orc_bat_broth.name: Orcish Cave Broth
orc_bat_broth.lore: Orcs brew this on long campaigns when rations run dry. It is not good, but it keeps warriors upright and moving.
orc_bat_broth.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth verdant broth made from orc blood and bat wing, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

gnoll_lion_ragout.name: Gnoll and Lion Ragout
gnoll_lion_ragout.lore: Two apex predators rendered down together, the ragout smells of blood, musk, and the savage hierarchy of the deep wilds.
gnoll_lion_ragout.sprite_desc: A bubbling iron pot of thick warm russet stew made from gnoll hide and lion meat, steam rising from the surface

death_knight_broth.name: Death Knight's Black Broth
death_knight_broth.lore: The Spartans drank their black broth to harden themselves for death. This broth is darker, colder, and carries the faint iron taste of something that no longer fears it.
death_knight_broth.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth dark broth made from charred bone and zombie flesh, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

hobgoblin_orc_stew.name: Regimental Stew
hobgoblin_orc_stew.lore: When goblinoid armies march, both bloods end up in the pot. Soldier's strength.
hobgoblin_orc_stew.sprite_desc: A bubbling iron pot of thick warm russet stew made from hobgoblin blood and orc blood, steam rising from the surface

lizard_frog_ragout.name: Cave Amphibian Ragout
lizard_frog_ragout.lore: Surprisingly delicate, if you can get past the skin.
lizard_frog_ragout.sprite_desc: A bubbling iron pot of thick verdant stew made from lizard meat and frog legs, steam rising from the surface

bear_troll_haunch.name: Monstrous Meat Haunch
bear_troll_haunch.lore: Troll flesh regenerates even during cooking. The combined vitality is extraordinary.
bear_troll_haunch.sprite_desc: A wooden platter bearing a glistening roast of bear meat and troll hide, seared to a warm russet crust with herb garnish

hobgoblin_ogre_feast.name: Warlord's War Feast
hobgoblin_ogre_feast.lore: The spoils of two brutal commanders, cooked together. Raw dominance in every bite.
hobgoblin_ogre_feast.sprite_desc: A large ornate platter laden with an elaborate arrangement of hobgoblin blood and ogre hide, garnished with edible flowers and warm russet sauce

spectral_eye_consomme.name: Spectral Eye ConsommÃ©
spectral_eye_consomme.lore: You can see beyond the veil after eating this. The dead share what the living cannot know.
spectral_eye_consomme.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth pale violet broth made from spectral essence and eye jelly, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

shadow_crystal_broth.name: Shadow-Walker's Broth
shadow_crystal_broth.lore: Solid shadows dissolved in darkness. Grants brief invisibility.
shadow_crystal_broth.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth earthy broth made from shadow essence and shadow crystal, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

wisp_soul_risotto.name: Will-o-Wisp Risotto
wisp_soul_risotto.lore: Ethereal ingredients merge at the boundary of thought and existence. Understanding comes unbidden.
wisp_soul_risotto.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared wisp essence and soul fragment, plated with a pale violet reduction drizzled on top

bugbear_troll_roast.name: Brute's Double Roast
bugbear_troll_roast.lore: Two of the dungeon's most feared brutes, slow-roasted until the rage leaves them and enters you.
bugbear_troll_roast.sprite_desc: A wooden platter bearing a glistening roast of bugbear pelt and troll hide, seared to a warm russet crust with herb garnish

spider_phase_silk_dish.name: Phased Silk Noodles
spider_phase_silk_dish.lore: Normal and phase silk twined together. Your movements become as fluid as the phasing itself.
spider_phase_silk_dish.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared spider silk and phase silk, plated with a pale violet reduction drizzled on top

demon_heart_roast.name: Demon Heart Roast
demon_heart_roast.lore: You should not be cooking this. And yet here you are. Infernal power floods through you.
demon_heart_roast.sprite_desc: A wooden platter bearing a glistening roast of nalfeshnee heart and hezrou demon bile, seared to a warm russet crust with herb garnish

elder_vampire_phylactery_elixir.name: Undeath Synthesis Elixir
elder_vampire_phylactery_elixir.lore: Centuries of accumulated vampire cunning and a lich's distilled intellect. Ancient wisdom absorbed.
elder_vampire_phylactery_elixir.sprite_desc: A glass flask of shimmering warm russet liquid distilled from elder vampire blood and necromancer phylactery, tiny bubbles rising within

cerebral_eye_pudding.name: Mind Flayer's Pudding
cerebral_eye_pudding.lore: Mind flayers eat brains. You eat their fluid. The alien intelligence floods your thoughts, and you are sharper for it.
cerebral_eye_pudding.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared cerebral fluid and eye jelly, plated with a earthy reduction drizzled on top

death_essence_soul_stew.name: Death's Harvest Stew
death_essence_soul_stew.lore: Harvested from the boundary of life and death. Reinforces your hold on existence.
death_essence_soul_stew.sprite_desc: A bubbling iron pot of thick earthy stew made from death essence and soul fragment, steam rising from the surface

troll_ogre_regeneration_broth.name: Regeneration Broth
troll_ogre_regeneration_broth.lore: The troll gland still twitches in the pot. That's how you know it's working.
troll_ogre_regeneration_broth.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth verdant broth made from troll regeneration gland and ogre hide, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

dragon_fire_gland_elixir.name: Dragon Blood Elixir
dragon_fire_gland_elixir.lore: Fire and scale â€” the draconic essence distilled into one supremely dangerous drink.
dragon_fire_gland_elixir.sprite_desc: A glass flask of shimmering warm russet liquid distilled from Dragon Scale and fire gland, tiny bubbles rising within

chaos_void_brew.name: Void Chaos Brew
chaos_void_brew.lore: The effects are unpredictable, like everything touched by chaos and void.
chaos_void_brew.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared chaos essence and void shard, plated with a earthy reduction drizzled on top

cultist_arcane_tincture.name: Arcane Cultist Tincture
cultist_arcane_tincture.lore: Dark sorcery and ancient bone powder. The forbidden knowledge seeps in with every drop.
cultist_arcane_tincture.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared cultist reagent and arcane bone dust, plated with a earthy reduction drizzled on top

changeling_puca_illusion_soup.name: Fae Illusion Soup
changeling_puca_illusion_soup.lore: The fae have always known secrets of concealment. This soup smells of both mischief and magic.
changeling_puca_illusion_soup.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth pale violet broth made from changeling glamour and puca hair, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

drow_venom_tincture.name: Drow Venom Tincture
drow_venom_tincture.lore: Drow spend centuries perfecting their venoms. Neutralized and taken as a tincture, the body learns their precision.
drow_venom_tincture.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared drow poison extract and paralytic venom, plated with a earthy reduction drizzled on top

basilisk_medusa_grand_feast.name: Gorgon's Grand Feast
basilisk_medusa_grand_feast.lore: Both creatures turn things to stone with a glance. Cooked together, they give you eyes like theirs.
basilisk_medusa_grand_feast.sprite_desc: A large ornate platter laden with an elaborate arrangement of basilisk eye and Medusa's Blood, garnished with edible flowers and warm russet sauce

chimera_dragon_roast.name: Chimera and Dragon Roast
chimera_dragon_roast.lore: Two of the most terrible predators in the deep. Their flesh combined is beyond transcendent.
chimera_dragon_roast.sprite_desc: A wooden platter bearing a glistening roast of chimera heart and Dragon Scale, seared to a earthy crust with herb garnish

lich_vampire_death_banquet.name: The Undying Banquet
lich_vampire_death_banquet.lore: Lich and vampire — two forms of cheating death. Together they may share their secret with you.
lich_vampire_death_banquet.sprite_desc: A large ornate platter laden with an elaborate arrangement of necromancer phylactery and elder vampire blood, garnished with edible flowers and earthy sauce

devourer_soul_judges_feast.name: Ammit's Judgment Feast
devourer_soul_judges_feast.lore: Ammit, the Egyptian devourer of unworthy hearts, weighed souls against the feather of Ma'at. To consume her essence alongside her quarry is to inherit the terrible wisdom of judgment.
devourer_soul_judges_feast.sprite_desc: A large ornate platter laden with an elaborate arrangement of devourer tooth and soul fragment, garnished with edible flowers and warm russet sauce

pit_fiend_void_supremacy.name: Infernal Void Supremacy
pit_fiend_void_supremacy.lore: The deepest evil and the deepest void. Those who survive eating this are changed forever.
pit_fiend_void_supremacy.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared pit fiend scale and void ichor, plated with a warm russet reduction drizzled on top

troll_demon_brain_undying.name: The Undying Formula
troll_demon_brain_undying.lore: Regeneration, infernal fire, and the essence of death itself. The ultimate tonic of survival.
troll_demon_brain_undying.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared troll regeneration gland, nalfeshnee heart, and death essence, plated with a verdant reduction drizzled on top

shadow_bat_stew.name: Cave Shadow Stew
shadow_bat_stew.lore: Shadow hound and bat — both creatures of darkness. Their essence grants temporary concealment.
shadow_bat_stew.sprite_desc: A bubbling iron pot of thick dark stew made from shadow fur and bat wing, steam rising from the surface

grub_goblin_bake.name: Grub and Goblin Bake
grub_goblin_bake.lore: Goblins eat grubs regularly. You're just cutting out the middleman.
grub_goblin_bake.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared insect carapace and goblin flesh, plated with a warm russet reduction drizzled on top

lycan_troll_broth.name: Feral Broth
lycan_troll_broth.lore: Werewolf ferocity and troll vitality. Two natures of unstoppable savagery, one broth.
lycan_troll_broth.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth warm russet broth made from lycanthrope blood and troll hide, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

raven_eagle_consomme.name: Sky Hunter's ConsommÃ©
raven_eagle_consomme.lore: The raven sees omens. The eagle sees clearly. Both feathers boiled grant exceptional sight.
raven_eagle_consomme.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth dark broth made from raven feather and eagle feather, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

naga_python_scales.name: Serpent Scales Supreme
naga_python_scales.lore: Two magnificent serpents. One divine, one natural. Their serpentine grace becomes yours.
naga_python_scales.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared naga scale and python scales, plated with a verdant reduction drizzled on top

owlbear_griffin_feast.name: Chimeric Predator Feast
owlbear_griffin_feast.lore: Two hybrid predators that shouldn't exist — their impossible power becomes inexplicably yours.
owlbear_griffin_feast.sprite_desc: A large ornate platter laden with an elaborate arrangement of owlbear feather and griffin feather, garnished with edible flowers and warm russet sauce

barrow_embalming_stew.name: Tomb Guardian Stew
barrow_embalming_stew.lore: Ancient preservatives that kept corpses intact for centuries. Renders the living nearly as indestructible.
barrow_embalming_stew.sprite_desc: A bubbling iron pot of thick warm russet stew made from barrow dust and embalming resin, steam rising from the surface

wisp_shadow_brew.name: Twilight Brew
wisp_shadow_brew.lore: Light and shadow at the boundary between worlds. Only the wise understand both â€” and after this, you will.
wisp_shadow_brew.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared wisp essence and shadow essence, plated with a pale violet reduction drizzled on top

orc_bugbear_conquest.name: Conqueror's Pottage
orc_bugbear_conquest.lore: Goblinoid warriors eat together before battle. You eat them after. Conqueror's strength.
orc_bugbear_conquest.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared orc blood and bugbear pelt, plated with a verdant reduction drizzled on top

spider_web_stew.name: Spider-Silk Mushroom Stew
spider_web_stew.description: Silk threads dissolved into mushroom broth bend light around the drinker.
spider_web_stew.sprite_desc: A bubbling iron pot of thick pale violet stew made from spider silk and cave mushroom, steam rising from the surface

bat_wing_cracklings.name: Bat Wing Cracklings
bat_wing_cracklings.description: Crisped bat wing with thyme. Something about the hollowness of the bones quickens the legs.
bat_wing_cracklings.sprite_desc: A wooden platter bearing a glistening roast of bat wing and wild thyme, seared to a earthy crust with herb garnish

slime_brined_goblin.name: Slime-Brined Goblin Shank
slime_brined_goblin.description: The acidic slime brine permeates the goblin meat, building gut resistance to toxins.
slime_brined_goblin.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared goblin flesh and slime core, plated with a verdant reduction drizzled on top

fallen_bone_broth.name: Fallen Warrior's Bone Broth
fallen_bone_broth.description: Marrow coaxed from shattered bones with root vegetables. The dead still nourish the living.
fallen_bone_broth.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth warm russet broth made from bone shard and cave carrot, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

rat_goblin_street_pot.name: Rat and Goblin Street Pot
rat_goblin_street_pot.description: The foundational recipe of the dungeon underclass. Filling, cheap, and surprisingly nutritious.
rat_goblin_street_pot.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared rat meat and goblin flesh, plated with a warm russet reduction drizzled on top

cold_cave_jelly.name: Cold Cave Jelly
cold_cave_jelly.description: Slime set cold in a frost gland casing. Numb to the cold before you're numb for good.
cold_cave_jelly.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared slime core and frost gland, plated with a verdant reduction drizzled on top

ember_rat_fire_fusion.name: Ember-Fused Rat Broth
ember_rat_fire_fusion.description: The fire beetle's gland renders the rat fat volcanic. Provides temporary fire resistance.
ember_rat_fire_fusion.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth warm russet broth made from rat meat and fire gland, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

troll_regen_chowder.name: Troll Regeneration Chowder
troll_regen_chowder.description: Two of the dungeon's most resilient creatures combined in a hearty chowder. Wounds knit themselves.
troll_regen_chowder.sprite_desc: A bubbling iron pot of thick verdant stew made from troll hide and bear meat, steam rising from the surface

wolf_herb_hunters_roast.name: Wolf and Herb Hunter's Roast
wolf_herb_hunters_roast.description: A woodland hunter's meal of slow-roasted wolf with aromatic mountain herbs. Strengthens the body for battle.
wolf_herb_hunters_roast.sprite_desc: A wooden platter bearing a glistening roast of wolf meat, wild thyme, and rosemary sprig, seared to a warm russet crust with herb garnish

harpy_wing_bisque.name: Harpy Wing Bisque
harpy_wing_bisque.description: Hollow harpy bones dissolved in root vegetable broth. The lightness of flight passes to the eater.
harpy_wing_bisque.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth warm russet broth made from hollow bone and cave carrot, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

snake_troll_fortifier.name: Snake-Troll Fortifier
snake_troll_fortifier.description: Snake venom proteins rendered harmless by troll resilience. The body learns to endure.
snake_troll_fortifier.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared snake meat and troll hide, plated with a verdant reduction drizzled on top

bear_claw_stew.name: Bear Claw Stew
bear_claw_stew.description: Two apex predators of the caves combined with fungi. The strength of both flows into the eater.
bear_claw_stew.sprite_desc: A bubbling iron pot of thick warm russet stew made from bear meat, gnoll hide, and cave mushroom, steam rising from the surface

goblin_slime_ferment.name: Goblin-Slime Ferment
goblin_slime_ferment.description: The alchemical properties of slime, tempered by goblin constitution and root herbs, resist magical forces.
goblin_slime_ferment.sprite_desc: A ceramic plate of beautifully prepared goblin flesh, slime core, and valerian root, plated with a verdant reduction drizzled on top

frost_fire_paradox.name: Frost-Fire Paradox Soup
frost_fire_paradox.description: Opposing elements in one pot create chaotic energy. The resulting meal unpredictably strengthens the body.
frost_fire_paradox.sprite_desc: A stone bowl filled with smooth warm russet broth made from fire gland and frost gland, wisps of fragrant steam curling above

corrupted_bone_risotto.name: Corrupted Bone Risotto
